name: Ayat Bushwick
sourceQuote: Ayat Bushwick: "A bidet in the bathroom stands out as a key feature" and "The bathroom here was surprisingly clean and even had a bidet."

name: Kura Revolving Sushi Bar (Pittsburgh)
sourceQuote: TripAdvisor review: "The toilets are life changing for an American its a power washer for your backside" and "the life changing experience of their Japanese porcelain thrones."

name: Rokusho
address: 6634 W Sunset Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90028
sourceQuote: The Infatuation: "the wildest, most high-tech toilet of our life at this modern Japanese bar in Hollywood. The fully automated $10k throne (Toto brand)" in the restroom.

name: Park Hyatt London River Thames
bidetType: TOTO Washlet / fully automatic bidet toilet
sourceQuote: Turning Left For Less review: "The separate water closet with a fully automatic bidet toilet that had a heated seat and various functions" and AwardTravel: "a separate toilet room housed a high-tech Toto Washlet."

name: Japan House London
sourceQuote: Japan House London / Embassy of Japan event page: "After the talk, why not pay a visit to our own TOTO WASHLETS at Japan House and try them out for yourself?"

name: YO! Sushi Oxford Circus
sourceQuote: TOTO Europe reference: YO! Sushi installed a luxury TOTO NEOREST LE WASHLET WC in their central London Oxford Circus restaurant; staff promote the facility to guests.

name: Britannia Hotel Manchester
sourceQuote: Travel blog review of a four-poster suite: "The bathroom was a fabulous size, with a big sink area, bath and shower combo, and a bidet!"
accessNote: Hotel guests; bidet reported in suite room category

name: Nobu Hotel Toronto
sourceQuote: Nobu Hotel Toronto official room page lists "Japanese Toto toilet" in spa-inspired bathrooms; Globe and Mail review: "a futuristic toilet – which announced its presence every 20 minutes by raising its lid."

name: The Ritz-Carlton, Toronto
address: 181 Wellington Street West, Toronto, ON M5V 3C7
bidetType: TOTO smart toilet with built-in bidet
sourceQuote: Points With Mike review: "The toilet had its own enclosed room and featured an auto-opening lid, heated seat, and built-in bidet"; TripAdvisor Simcoe suite review mentions a TOTO toilet.
accessNote: Hotel guests; bidet toilets in suites

name: Miyabi 45th
bidetType: High-tech bidet toilet with heated seat
sourceQuote: Seattle Met: "High-tech, multi-function bidets in the bathrooms at Miyabi 45th in Wallingford"; r/Seattle: "Since Miyabi has bidets for their restrooms."
